faculty: Engineering, the Built Environment and Technology

qualifications.name: Diploma in Operations Management
notes: Source: 2026 MandelaUni Undergraduate Guide.
Admission score type: Applicant Score (AS).
AS is calculated using Nelson Mandela University applicant-score rules: three fundamentals plus the next best subjects, Life Orientation excluded unless the official quintile bonus applies.
AS variants: Mathematics: 310 with 40%+; Technical Mathematics: 310 with 40%+; Mathematical Literacy: 325 with 60%+.

one_of.subject: Mathematics
one_of.note: Original subject requirement: Mathematics or Technical Mathematics: 40%.

one_of.subject: Technical Mathematics
one_of.note: Original subject requirement: Mathematics or Technical Mathematics: 40%.

qualifications.name: Bachelor of Engineering in Mechatronics
notes: Source: 2026 MandelaUni Undergraduate Guide.
Admission score type: Applicant Score (AS).
AS is calculated using Nelson Mandela University applicant-score rules: three fundamentals plus the next best subjects, Life Orientation excluded unless the official quintile bonus applies.

Alternative access: Higher Certificate in Mechatronic Engineering or Higher Certificate in Renewable Energy Engineering with an average of 75% or above and at least 75% for Mathematics may be considered; no credits are granted for Higher Certificate modules.
Recommended subjects: Engineering Graphics and Design, Information Technology.
AS variants: Mathematics: 410 with 60%+.

qualifications.name: Bachelor of Engineering Technology in Electrical Engineering
notes: Source: 2026 MandelaUni Undergraduate Guide.
Admission score type: Applicant Score (AS).
AS is calculated using Nelson Mandela University applicant-score rules: three fundamentals plus the next best subjects, Life Orientation excluded unless the official quintile bonus applies.

Alternative access: Higher Certificate in Mechatronics Engineering or Higher Certificate in Renewable Energy Engineering from Nelson Mandela University with an average of 60% or above and at least 60% for Mathematics.
AS variants: Mathematics: 370 with 60%+; Technical Mathematics: 370 with 60%+.

qualifications.name: Diploma in Architectural Technology
notes: Source: 2026 MandelaUni Undergraduate Guide.
Admission score type: Applicant Score (AS).
AS is calculated using Nelson Mandela University applicant-score rules: three fundamentals plus the next best subjects, Life Orientation excluded unless the official quintile bonus applies.
Some applicants may be required to attend a three-week preparation to architectural technology course before registration.
AS variants: Mathematics: 330 with 45%+; Technical Mathematics: 330 with 45%+; Mathematical Literacy: 345 with 60%+.

one_of.note: Original subject requirement: Mathematics or Technical Mathematics: 45%.

qualifications.name: Diploma in Interior Design
notes: Source: 2026 MandelaUni Undergraduate Guide.
Admission score type: Applicant Score (AS).
AS is calculated using Nelson Mandela University applicant-score rules: three fundamentals plus the next best subjects, Life Orientation excluded unless the official quintile bonus applies.
Recommended subjects: Visual Arts, Design.
Visual Arts and Design are recommended but not prerequisites.
AS variants: Mathematics: 315 with 30%+; Technical Mathematics: 315 with 30%+; Mathematical Literacy: 330 with 45%+.

one_of.note: Original subject requirement: Mathematics or Technical Mathematics: 30%.

qualifications.name: Bachelor of Architectural Studies
notes: Source: 2026 MandelaUni Undergraduate Guide.
Admission score type: Applicant Score (AS).
AS is calculated using Nelson Mandela University applicant-score rules: three fundamentals plus the next best subjects, Life Orientation excluded unless the official quintile bonus applies.
Architecture route shown as BAS 3 years plus BAS Honours 1 year plus MArch Professional 1 year.
Applicants are notified of the outcome only after meeting the department to discuss portfolio and interview.
AS variants: Mathematics: 370 with 55%+.

notes: Source: 2026 MandelaUni Undergraduate Guide.
